creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
Actually, needs LOTS of 'post 2.10.10' patches, since 2.10.10 is 
effectively broken.

this just upgrades it without the patches.



Mike Jakubik wrote:
> I needed to update my own copy, so i wrote a patch to bring the port 
> up to date, below is the diff.
>
> diff -urN phplist.orig/Makefile phplist/Makefile
> --- phplist.orig/Makefile       2009-11-24 14:09:59.000000000 -0500
> +++ phplist/Makefile    2009-11-24 14:29:23.000000000 -0500
> @@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
> # $FreeBSD: ports/mail/phplist/Makefile,v 1.4 2009/02/09 14:59:51 miwi 
> Exp $
>
> PORTNAME=      phplist
> -PORTVERSION=   2.10.9
> +PORTVERSION=   2.10.10
> CATEGORIES=    mail www
> MASTER_SITES=  SF
> EXTRACT_SUFX=  .tgz
> diff -urN phplist.orig/distinfo phplist/distinfo
